papers.title: The Vejle Diabetes Biobank: a resource for studies of the aetiological heterogeneity of type 2 diabetes
papers.institution: Vejle Hospital / Steno Diabetes Center Odense
papers.access_route: Material Transfer Agreement with Vejle Hospital biobank; contact via corresponding author
papers.notes: BMI, HbA1c, and lipid panel documented per subject; longitudinal design with up to 10-year follow-up; EDTA plasma collected fasting

papers.title: The Danish Centre for Strategic Research in Type 2 Diabetes (DD2) cohort: characteristics of the first patients
papers.access_route: Application to DD2 steering committee (www.dd2.nu); national Danish research biobank
papers.notes: National incident T2D cohort; medication fully documented; BMI, eGFR, albuminuria captured at baseline; urine albumin-creatinine ratio available

papers.title: Chronic Renal Insufficiency Cohort (CRIC) Study: design and methods
papers.journal: Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
papers.access_route: repository.niddk.nih.gov; application-based access with IRB and DUA required
papers.notes: 47% of participants diabetic; annual biospecimen collection; urine and plasma available longitudinally; BMI documented at each visit; multi-site US cohort

expected_retrievable_institutions: Vejle Hospital / Steno Diabetes Center Odense
notes: All three biobanks have paired EDTA plasma + urine with BMI documentation. DD2 and CRIC are actively managed repositories with formal application processes. Vejle requires direct PI contact. Storage at -80C confirmed for all.
